plant.title: ZZ Plant
plant.summary: ZZ Plants are known for their glossy, dark green leaves and remarkable ability to thrive in low light with infrequent watering. They are nearly indestructible and perfect for low-light offices or homes. However, all parts of the plant are toxic to cats and dogs, causing severe digestive issues if ingested.
plant.contentHtml: Zamioculcas zamiifolia originates from East Africa and has become a trendy houseplant due to its modern appearance and easy care. The plant stores water in its potato-like rhizomes, allowing it to drought for long periods. Keep out of reach of pets.
